message:
Fix Claude CLI -p hello command to run successfully

Key fixes:
- Add events.setMaxListeners static function for AbortSignal support
- Move TextEncoder/TextDecoder polyfill before util module definition
- Implement proper openSync/closeSync/writeFileSync with pseudo-fd tracking
- Add process.stdin stream polyfill with setEncoding, on, off, emit methods
- Clean up debug output for production use

The CLI now initializes and runs correctly. Note: actual API calls
require network support which WASI doesn't provide, but the CLI
completes without errors.
